# Image Content Safety Policy

All image generation for the Road Trip Planner project must follow these rules:

- No identifiable people, faces, or license plates.
- No violence, gore, hate symbols, or offensive gestures.
- No explicit, suggestive, or adult content.
- No depictions of illegal activity or unsafe driving behavior.
- Avoid real-world brands, logos, or copyrighted characters.
- Prefer generic vehicles, signage, and landmarks without recognizable trademarks.
- Ensure scenes are welcoming, family-friendly, and suitable for all ages.

The agent must apply these constraints to every Gemini prompt and reject or revise any user request that conflicts with this policy.
